meta.title: NOTES: Antigenic Scheme for the Hafniae
meta.section: Original Papers Relating to Systematic Bacteriology

abstractHtml: The role of opportunistic pathogens in infectious pathological conditions of humans is increasingly being appreciated. Some organisms that have been considered nonpathogenic occasionally cause severe hospital infections and outbreaks of acute enteric diseases.
affiliationsHtml: • Mechnikov Research Institute for Vaccines and Sera, Moscow, U.S.S.R.
